name: bioethics_sensor_fusion_upgrade_mislabels_harbor_rig_utl
premise: A compassionate-use request arrived for a drug not yet manufactured at scale; triage committee has two vials and three candidates. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around bioethics sensor fusion upgrade mislabels harbor rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A court filing or contractual notice deadline expires at close of business; missing it waives a procedural defense. No option cleanly satisfies both rights and utility; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Leila Hughes
agents.identity: I am Leila Hughes, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Marco Dubois
agents.identity: I am Marco Dubois, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on utility.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on utility for immediate traction on rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Leila Hughes must choose under rights versus utility. What does Leila Hughes do?
